chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1016 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For Directions For hearing of CMA 676/24 14-03-2024 Mr. Sikandar Sadar Siddiqui, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ziaul Haque Kamboh, Advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G. ***** Aftab Mallah, Town Officer, Town Committee, Mehrabpur has submitted original cheque of Rs.300,000/-dated 11.03.2024 in the name of petitioner, which is deposited with the Accountant of this Court, who shall hand over it to the petitioner on due verification and identification. Learned counsel for respondent No.3 undertakes that outstanding amount of Rs.600,000/- would be paid to the petitioner within one month without fail. Order accordingly. The listed application is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
